Where every sip
finds its golden moment

Single-origin beans, brewed with intention. Our roasts are honest, our cups are warm.

Full Menu — قائمتنا
Drink it in
All prices in EGP · Oat milk +15 EGP · Extra shot +15 EGP · Syrups +10 EGP
Espresso إسبريسو
45 / 55 EGP
Double ristretto pull. Golden crema, notes of dark chocolate and dried cherry. 7g or 14g freshly ground.
Hot
Americano أمريكانو
55 / 65 EGP
Hot water poured first, espresso on top to preserve crema. Clean and bright.
Hot
Cortado كورتادو
65 / 75 EGP
Equal parts espresso and steamed milk. The milk cuts the acidity without overpowering.
Hot
Flat White فلات وايت
75 / 85 EGP
Ristretto over 120ml velvety microfoam. Smaller, stronger than a latte — about 150ml total.
Hot
Cappuccino كابتشينو
75 / 85 EGP
1/3 espresso · 1/3 steamed milk · 1/3 dry foam. Dusted with cocoa. Classic ratio, perfectly balanced.
Hot
Latte لاتيه
80 / 90 EGP
1–2 shots with 200ml silky microfoam. Light latte art. Oat milk available.
Hot
Iced Americano أمريكانو بارد
65 / 80 EGP
Espresso pulled stronger over ice and cold filtered water. Layered, refreshing, bold.
Cold
Iced Latte لاتيه بارد
85 / 100 EGP
2 espresso shots poured gently over cold milk and ice for a beautiful layered pour.
Cold
Iced Matcha ماتشا بارد
90 / 105 EGP
Ceremonial matcha whisked smooth, poured over cold milk and ice. Add vanilla syrup for sweetness.
Cold
Herbal Tea شاي أعشاب
50 / 65 EGP
Chamomile, mint, or ginger. Steeped 3–5 minutes. Served with honey and lemon on the side.
Herbal
Matcha Latte ماتشا لاتيه
85 / 100 EGP
Ceremonial grade matcha whisked with 70°C water, topped with steamed milk and a dusting of matcha.
No coffee
Honey Oat Latte لاتيه العسل والشوفان
95 / 110 EGP
2 espresso shots, raw honey dissolved while hot, steamed oat milk at 60°C, dusted with cinnamon.
Signature
Brown Sugar Latte لاتيه سكر بني
95 / 110 EGP
House brown sugar syrup stirred into espresso, topped with steamed milk and generous cinnamon dust.
Signature
Seasonal Special إصدار موسمي
100 / 115 EGP
Rotating monthly. Ask your barista what's on today. Summer: Mango cold foam latte. Winter: Cardamom spiced.
Limited

+15 EGP

Gold Bean · Alexandria
Our Story

Born from a love of the honest cup

Gold Bean started with one question: why does great specialty coffee have to be a luxury in Alexandria? We believed it didn't. So we built a café where young professionals and remote workers could find quality, calm, and a cup that actually tastes like something.

We source locally from Egyptian specialty roasters, keep our menu short and intentional, and train every barista to follow recipes with precision. Quality is our brand — not just a phrase.

Our space is work-friendly by design: strong Wi-Fi, good light, power outlets, and enough ambient warmth to make two hours feel like twenty minutes.

🌱
Quality over quantity
Short menu, high standards, no compromise
🤝
Local sourcing
Egyptian specialty roasters, direct relationships
💻
Work-friendly
Wi-Fi, outlets, and a calm productive space
📋
Recipe precision
Every barista trained to exact spec
